name: Haselnusstorte (Hazelnut Torte)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh Strawberries; Chopped, If Desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks and sugar until very light, about 5 minutes.
2. Slowly add the water to the yolk mixture.
3. Sift together the flour and baking powder.
4. Mix 1 cup of ground hazelnuts with 1 tablespoon of confectioners' sugar.
5. Fold the sifted flour mixture into the egg yolk mixture.
6. Beat the egg whites until soft peaks form.
7. Gently fold the beaten whites into the batter, alternating with a third of the batter to incorporate evenly.
8. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 10-inch springform pan.
9. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool the cake on a wire rack.
11. When completely cooled, split the cake into two layers.
12. Fold the remaining confectioners' sugar and hazelnuts into the whipped cream.
13. Spread the whipped cream between the cake layers and over the top of the cake.
14. Chill the cake until serving time.
15. Garnish with fresh strawberries, if desired.
Hazelnuts are available at most stores under the name Filberts. They should be blanched by boiling for 5 minutes and then removing the skins when cool enough to handle. To grind, place about 1/4 cup at a time in a blender or chop as finely as possible with a sharp knife.
